meta.description: Rules for correct token pairing, forbidden combinations, and hierarchy. Generated from: border.md, color-guidelines.md, color-tokens-semantic.md, spacing.md, typography.md, radius.md, elevation.md, design-tokens.json
meta.agent_rule: Before generating any code, validate all token pairings against these rules. Any violation must be flagged as an error and the output must not be auto-merged.

color_rules.rule: Always use semantic tokens — never raw palette values
color_rules.detail: All components must use semantic decision tokens. Primitive palette values (dsBlue, dsRed, etc.) are never used directly in components or code.

color_rules.rule: Apply each token only for its defined role

examples.correct: Text.Critical for validation error messages only
Surface.Critical for critical status tag backgrounds
examples.incorrect: Surface.Critical for a highlighted card that is not an error

color_rules.rule: Semantic variant tokens must be used as a complete set
color_rules.detail: When using a semantic variant (critical, warning, success, information), always use all three tokens from the same group together: Surface, Icon, and Border. Never mix tokens from different semantic groups.

color_rules.rule: Text on colored backgrounds must use the On.* token
Text.Critical is only for validation error messages
color_rules.detail: Text.Critical must only be used for form field validation error text. It must not be used for decorative text, emphasis, or any non-error purpose.

color_rules.rule: Text color variables are scoped — text tokens apply to text layers only
color_rules.detail: In Figma and code, text color tokens (Text.*) can only be applied to text. Border tokens (Border.*) only to borders. Icon tokens (Icon.*) only to icon layers. Do not apply cross-scope.

color_rules.rule: Action.* tokens are exclusively for buttons
color_rules.detail: Action.Primary, Action.Secondary, Action.Destructive, Action.Tertiary tokens are intended only for button components and their states. Do not use Action tokens for other interactive surfaces.

color_rules.rule: Surface.Interactive.* tokens are for selected/active states only
color_rules.detail: Use Surface.Interactive tokens for checkbox checked state, switch on state, tab selected indicator, etc. Not for general hover surfaces.

border_rules.rule: Border color and border width tokens must match the same interaction state
Focus state always uses Border.Focused color + Border.Width.Focus (2px)
border_rules.detail: Every interactive component must show a 2px focus ring using Border.Focused on keyboard navigation. This is mandatory for accessibility.

border_rules.rule: Annotation border widths are only for Canvas annotation use cases
border_rules.detail: Border.Width.Annotation Light (2px), Medium (4px), Bold (8px) are exclusively for canvas annotation contexts. Do not use for UI component borders.

radius_rules.rule: Nested elements must use a smaller radius than their parent container
radius_rules.detail: When an element is nested inside a container, the child radius must be smaller than the parent radius to visually reflect containment hierarchy.

hierarchy.use_for: Inner parts e.g. segmented control selected segment
Elements that must have no rounded corners

radius_rules.rule: Do not use the same radius for parent and child elements
radius_rules.detail: Identical radii on nested components flatten the visual hierarchy and make containment unclear.

spacing_rules.rule: Use component spacing tokens inside components, layout spacing tokens between components
spacing_rules.detail: Spacing.Component.* tokens are for internal component spacing (padding, gaps between icon and label, etc.). Spacing.Layout.* tokens are for separating components from each other on a page.

component_tokens.Spacing.Component.M: 16px — Horizontal padding for buttons, text fields; gap between headline and content in cards
component_tokens.Spacing.Component.S: 12px — Horizontal padding in main menu items, vertical tabs
component_tokens.Spacing.Component.XS: 8px  — Gap between icon and label in buttons; vertical padding in buttons and text fields
component_tokens.Spacing.Component.XXS: 4px  — Gap between dropdown and menu; tooltip outer spacing; very small component internals

layout_tokens.Spacing.Layout.M: 24px / 16px — Between form columns, components, inner spacing of spacious cards
layout_tokens.Spacing.Layout.S: 16px / 12px — Between closely related components; compact card internal spacing
layout_tokens.Spacing.Layout.XS: 8px  — Above page headline; between very closely related components

spacing_rules.rule: Do not introduce custom spacing values
spacing_rules.detail: Never use arbitrary pixel values for spacing. Always use the nearest defined token. Custom spacing breaks responsive behaviour.

spacing_rules.rule: Layout spacing tokens are responsive — values differ in Small mode
spacing_rules.detail: Spacing.Layout.* tokens have two values: default (M–XL layouts) and Small (layout S only). Do not apply Small mode values to layouts M and above.

typography_rules.rule: Always pair a typography token with a valid text color token
typography_rules.detail: Every text element must use both a typography token (for size, weight, line-height) and a text color token (Text.Standard, Text.Subdued, Text.Disabled, Text.Critical, etc.). Never use raw color values on text.
Text.textAction (14px SemiBold, fixed) is the only valid typography token for button labels. It does not change in responsive Small mode.

typography_rules.rule: Heading tokens are responsive — font size changes in Small mode
typography_rules.detail: Text.heading* and Text.textLg tokens have smaller sizes in responsive layout S. Apply Small mode only for layout S.

typography_rules.rule: Typeface is Be Vietnam Pro — never override
typography_rules.detail: DS CORE uses Be Vietnam Pro. Noto Sans is the fallback for languages with special characters. No other typefaces are permitted.

typography_rules.rule: All UI text must use sentence case
typography_rules.detail: Every text element in the UI — labels, headlines, placeholders, error messages, button labels, tab labels, option list items — must use sentence case. No title case. No ALL CAPS.

elevation_rules.rule: Use the correct elevation level for component type

hierarchy.use_for: Popovers, side sheets, option lists, toasts

theme_rules.rule: All tokens must resolve correctly for both light and dark mode
theme_rules.detail: Every component must be tested against both themes. Never hardcode hex values — always use semantic tokens which automatically resolve per theme.

theme_rules.rule: Small mode is only for responsive layout S
theme_rules.detail: The Small mode of number tokens (typography sizes, layout spacing) applies exclusively to responsive layout S. Do not apply Small mode to layouts M–XL.
